arguments.argument:
event_inherited() bActive=true image_speed=0.3
//Enemy base statistics eName="Seeker Virus - Basic" maxLife=100 life=maxLife atkPower=2 bNoBonus=true hitOneTime=0
direction=point_direction(x,y,oPlayer1.x,oPlayer1.y-26)
jeremyText="Just a basic Virus instance without a host. It simply tries to go in your initial direction." chaoText="Eww, it's all gooey like the ones we saw on the island. Wow, that seems like so long ago that we were there..." devText="Oh wow, you scanned this thing...#Starting things off with a minigame seemed like a nifty way to start the third game. I wanted to keep it simple, yet with some sort of mechanic that I could expand upon should the minigame pop up later on..."
alarm[0]=1
